title: nephrolepis exaltata var. pectinata
intro: Nephrolepis exaltata var. pectinata, commonly known as the Lady Palm or Fishbone Fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and aid in the treatment of respiratory issues. The health benefits of Nephrolepis exaltata var. pectinata include its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of tea or tincture, and is said to help alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory conditions.
